message:
fix(whatsapp): deduplicate retryable API code logic and add JSON-RPC envelope to parse errors

Consolidate Meta API transient code matching (1, 2, 4, 368) into
is_retryable() and call it from to_fcp_error() instead of duplicating
the match list. Add missing "jsonrpc":"2.0" field to the parse error
response in main.rs for protocol compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
